B2: New Anime That Is Surprising Fans with Its

Available levels

Source topic: Anime Focus: Frieren and the quiet side of fantasy stories

Frieren is a fantasy anime about an elf mage after a long adventure. She travels with new friends and slowly understands human feelings better. Fans like the quiet mood, memory...
